intent: The READ-time assembly path in merge.py: serve-time merge_spans, lookahead reattachment of UserPromptSubmit spans, dropped/discarded vs deleted render states, count-vs-items divergence, cancelled-tool span loss, segment-aware ctx%, and prompt-edit forks vs real /rewinds. Drill in when spans exist but render wrong.
label: Trace serve-time merge & reconcile (reparent, reattach, forks/rewinds, render states)
